hooks.command: FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.luau$'; then selene "$FILE" 2>&1; stylua --check "$FILE" 2>&1; fi; exit 0

FILES=$(git -C "c:/Users/admin/Documents/LunaAnimator" diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep '\.luau$'); if [ -n "$FILES" ]; then cd "c:/Users/admin/Documents/LunaAnimator" && echo "$FILES" | xargs selene 2>&1; echo "$FILES" | xargs stylua --check 2>&1; fi; exit 0
